name: dev
description: General-purpose development guards: blocks hardcoded secrets, direct main pushes, destructive SQL migrations, --no-verify bypasses, comment lines in source code, and monitors CI pipeline status after every push. Works with any project.

_meta.notes: Root manifest for Copilot CLI. Copilot CLI MCP schema requires args array alongside command — bare command alone fails ZodError validation. bash -lc sources login profile so Go bin dir is in PATH. Minimal manifest for Claude Code lives in .claude-plugin/plugin.json.
